title: Add full-page hopeful transformation background to Community Testimonials page

requirements.text: Update the Community Testimonials page (frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx) to use a full-page background image with gentle, hopeful transformation imagery (butterfly flying into a beautiful sunrise) that covers the entire viewport behind all page content.

quotes: On the community testimoanials page a full background that uses transformation imagery, something symbolic, gentle and hopeful. Like a butterfly flying into a beautiful sunrise

acceptanceCriteria: The Testimonials page background is an image (not a gradient) and spans the full viewport and scroll height (cover, centered, no tiling).
Foreground content (header, form, testimonial cards, footer) remains readable on top of the background via a suitable overlay (e.g., translucent + optional blur).
The background does not interfere with page interactions (no layout shifts; scrolling and form submission work as before).

requirements.text: Add the new generated background image as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated and reference it directly from the Testimonials page (do not route image loading through the backend).

quotes: a full background that uses transformation imagery... Like a butterfly flying into a beautiful sunrise

acceptanceCriteria: The new background image file exists at frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename specified in imageRequirements.required.
TestimonialsPage.tsx references the new image via a /assets/generated/... path and renders it as the page background.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui (shadcn components are read-only).
Keep changes scoped to the Testimonials page background treatment; do not alter backend behavior.
nonGoals: Do not change the testimonials data model, submission flow, or backend canister logic.
Do not redesign other pages (Landing, Dashboard, Tools) beyond what is necessary to implement the Testimonials page background.

required: Full-screen background illustration: butterfly in flight toward a warm sunrise with soft clouds and gentle, hopeful color palette; subtle, symbolic transformation mood; no text (im-fine-bg-testimonials-butterfly-sunrise.dim_1920x1080.png)
